title: Manage restoration of cultural places
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage restoration of cultural places demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan required restoration measures

pcs.text: Access prior assessment of cultural significance of place to determine range of required actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access prior assessment of cultural significance of place to determine range of required actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access prior assessment of cultural significance of place to determine range of required actions.

pcs.text: Develop short-term plan of management and conservation from area strategies and plans according to legislative requirements, organisational procedures and national and international charters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop short-term plan of management and conservation from area strategies and plans according to legislative requirements, organisational procedures and national and international charters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop short-term plan of management and conservation from area strategies and plans according to legislative requirements, organisational procedures and national and international charters.

pcs.text: Research and record traditional building techniques, materials and material availability to plan maintenance of fabric in traditional styles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and record traditional building techniques, materials and material availability to plan maintenance of fabric in traditional styles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and record traditional building techniques, materials and material availability to plan maintenance of fabric in traditional styles.

pcs.text: Identify and report on any prior works not in keeping with significance to determine appropriate maintenance actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report on any prior works not in keeping with significance to determine appropriate maintenance actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report on any prior works not in keeping with significance to determine appropriate maintenance actions.

pcs.text: Record any necessary structural engineering maintenance with experts to incorporate actions into maintenance schedule
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record any necessary structural engineering maintenance with experts to incorporate actions into maintenance schedule?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record any necessary structural engineering maintenance with experts to incorporate actions into maintenance schedule.

pcs.text: Develop maintenance schedule to meet plan of management and conservation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop maintenance schedule to meet plan of management and conservation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop maintenance schedule to meet plan of management and conservation.

pcs.text: Make submissions to obtain appropriate funds to complete works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make submissions to obtain appropriate funds to complete works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make submissions to obtain appropriate funds to complete works.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan restoration work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan restoration work.

pcs.text: Review plans to ensure compliance with Burra Charter guidelines and other legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review plans to ensure compliance with Burra Charter guidelines and other legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review plans to ensure compliance with Burra Charter guidelines and other legislative requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan required restoration measures

elements.title: Manage restoration works

pcs.text: Obtain expert advice on specific maintenance works and contracts to meet requirements of management and conservation plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain expert advice on specific maintenance works and contracts to meet requirements of management and conservation plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain expert advice on specific maintenance works and contracts to meet requirements of management and conservation plans.

pcs.text: Specify special building and conservation requirements in maintenance documentation to maintain significance, and use traditional building techniques, where appropriate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Specify special building and conservation requirements in maintenance documentation to maintain significance, and use traditional building techniques, where appropriate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify special building and conservation requirements in maintenance documentation to maintain significance, and use traditional building techniques, where appropriate.

pcs.text: Supervise workers and contractors to ensure risk assessment is undertaken and work health and safety policies and procedures are followed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supervise workers and contractors to ensure risk assessment is undertaken and work health and safety policies and procedures are followed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supervise workers and contractors to ensure risk assessment is undertaken and work health and safety policies and procedures are followed.

pcs.text: Inform and supervise workers to ensure significance of place is maintained and no damage or degradation is caused to environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inform and supervise workers to ensure significance of place is maintained and no damage or degradation is caused to environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform and supervise workers to ensure significance of place is maintained and no damage or degradation is caused to environment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Manage restoration works
